{"id":"smallhold-2dq","title":"GET /users/:username: AP doc with content-type negotiation","description":"Implement actor document endpoint. Content negotiation: Accept application/activity+json or application/ld+json serves AP Person document. Accept text/html serves 302 redirect to /@username. Accept application/json serves AP doc (Pleroma compat). Unknown Accept serves AP doc as default. The @context array must match the spec exactly.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to fetch a real actor document from mastodon.social and document every field. Spawn a testing subagent to write a conformance test that validates our output against the mastodon.social structure.

Test discipline:
- Fetch https://mastodon.social/users/Gargron with Accept: application/activity+json — use as oracle
- Test each content-type negotiation branch independently
- Verify @context array contains all required extension terms from the spec
- Verify publicKey.id ends with #main-key
- Verify inbox is /users/{username}/inbox, sharedInbox is /inbox

Defensive programming:
- Never serve the private key or any hint of it in the actor document
- Validate username from path against accounts table — return 404 for unknown usernames
- featured collection URL must be present (empty OrderedCollection) even if no featured posts","acceptance_criteria":"Response matches mastodon.social actor document structure; HTML Accept gets redirect; Pleroma application/json gets AP doc; unknown username returns 404; @context has all extension terms","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:49Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:49Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-5l8","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:29:01Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
